It provides: High-speed internet access for students, faculty, and administrative staff. Advanced threat protection, including intrusion prevention and zero-day attack defense. Safe browsing with web filtering to ensure a secure digital learning environment. VPN support for secure remote access. With the Sophos XGS 4300, we ensure a safe, reliable, and efficient network that supports academic and administrative activities across the campus. switches, providing high-speed and reliable connectivity across the entire campus. Switching Capacity: 208 Gbps (24-port Gigabit Ethernet model) Stacking Bandwidth: 480 Gbps Benefits: Fast, secure, and scalable network for classrooms, labs, and administrative offices Procured in 29-05-2023 With these Layer 3 stackable switches, our campus enjoys a robust, future-ready network supporting efficient routing, seamless learning, research, and collaboration. Campus Internet Connectivity Our campus has a total internet bandwidth of 2 Gbps through high-speed leased-line connections, ensuring fast and reliable access for all academic, research, and administrative activities. We maintain redundancy to guarantee uninterrupted service: Vendor Bandwidth Tata Teleservices Ltd. 1Gbps PowerGrid Teleservices Limited 1Gbps With these dual 1 Gbps leased lines, the campus enjoys a combined bandwidth of 2 Gbps, providing seamless connectivity and ensuring continuity of online services even if one provider faces downtime.
